info.title: ADF Daemon API
info.description: Static OpenAPI contract for the local ADF daemon. The daemon is a headless ADF runtime for loading agents, starting and stopping them, sending chat turns, streaming events, inspecting runtime diagnostics, and resolving human-in-the-loop tasks.

get.summary: Stream live daemon events with Server-Sent Events

200.description: SSE stream of daemon event envelopes

schema.description: SSE frames whose data field is a DaemonEventEnvelope JSON object.

200.description: Settings file path and current settings

post.summary: Destroy daemon compute containers and images
Run compute setup or bootstrap step

get.summary: List installed MCP npm and Python packages
List sandbox packages available to code execution

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Package name. The daemon also accepts package as an alias.

post.summary: Check sandbox package manifest entries for missing installs

get.summary: Read recent tool calls by mesh agent
List models for a configured provider

post.summary: Start a detached ChatGPT subscription auth flow
Load an agent by .adf file path
Scan directories and autostart matching reviewed agents

get.summary: Read review information for an .adf file

post.summary: Mark an .adf file's agent as reviewed
Start a loaded agent or reload one from tracked directories
Alias for stop: unload an agent
Abort the current turn without unloading the agent

post.description: Returns immediately with a turn id. Observe results with /events or /agents/{id}/loop.

post.summary: Queue an arbitrary ADF event dispatch
post.description: Accepts a full dispatch, wrapped dispatch, raw event, or batch dispatch. Returns immediately with a trigger id. Observe results with /events or /agents/{id}/loop.

get.summary: Read agent logs after an id

post.summary: Rename an agent file folder prefix

get.summary: Read agent token usage from persisted loop rows
List identity metadata without secret values
List identity metadata without secret values

get.description: Returns secret values for localhost automation; do not expose the daemon API on an untrusted interface.

post.summary: Attach or update an agent provider config

delete.summary: Detach provider and delete provider credentials

get.description: Returns secret values for localhost automation; do not expose the daemon API on an untrusted interface.
Returns secret values for localhost automation; do not expose the daemon API on an untrusted interface.

delete.summary: Detach MCP server and delete credentials

get.description: Returns secret values for localhost automation; do not expose the daemon API on an untrusted interface.

post.summary: Resume or stop after a suspend request
Attach or update an adapter config

AgentIdPath.name: id
AgentIdPath.description: Loaded agent id, handle, or unique name, depending on endpoint support.

MethodNotAllowed.description: Method not allowed for current daemon configuration

ReviewRequired.description: Agent review is required before load

TriggerBody.description: A full dispatch, wrapped dispatch, raw event, or batch dispatch.
